name: GIGABYTE B760M DS3H WIFI6E GEN5 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax - BT 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B760M DS3H WIFI6E GEN5 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX LGA 1700 motherboard with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 support, ideal for compact high-performance builds.
